news.t: 3 Ways to Trade the Rise in Water Stocks

holdings.infoBox: PIO is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ebara stock at 8.72%, Roper Technologies at 8.46%, Companhia de Saneamento Básico do Estado de São Paulo - SABESP at 7.89%, Ecolab at 7.60%, and Pentair at 6.57%.

overview.description: The Invesco Global Water ETF (PIO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ OMX Global Water index. The fund tracks a liquidity-weighted index of global companies that create products to conserve and purify water for homes, businesses, and industries. PIO was launched on Jun 13, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
